category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a CLI downloader optimized for speed and preview; official manual describes saldl as a CLI downloader based on libcurl.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is saldl; official manual NAME section uses saldl.
docs_sources: Official saldl GitHub Pages site hosts the saldl(1) manual page and project homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/saldl/saldl; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says CLI downloader; official manual says it is based on libcurl and downloads chunks with multiple concurrent connections.
